column1: # Note: Simple kanji nouns are handled by the unknown word handler.
# Only add nouns that cause segmentation or POS issues.
# --- Formal nouns (形式名詞) - hiragana forms ---
# Note: もの/こと are in L1 with appropriate costs
# --- Time nouns (needed for compound boundary detection) ---
# 晴れ: noun form (fair weather) - without dict, recognized as VERB
# --- Verb-stem compound nouns (need dict to avoid verb interpretation) ---
# B37: しびれ - split as し+びれ
# B41: ひと味 - split as ひ+と+味
# B42: ぬいぐるみ - recognized as OTHER
# B44: 盛りだくさん - split as 盛りだく+さん
# --- Hiragana nouns (need dict to prevent over-splitting) ---
# Without dict, these are recognized as verb/adjective/other
# --- POS distinction and compound boundary nouns ---
# --- Mixed script compounds (カタカナ + 漢字) ---
# --- サブカル・スラング複合名詞 ---
